pull_request.title: fix(python_plugins_loader): suppress -Wconversion for SWIG-generated code
pull_request.body:
The SWIG-generated swigpyrun.h contains an implicit size_t to int narrowing in SWIG_Hash():
```c
  rem -= sizeof(unsigned int);
```
This triggers -Werror=conversion with GCC 16 (not Clang). The bug is fixed in SWIG master (https://github.com/swig/swig/pull/3287), but unfortunately, not in any released SWIG version at the time of writing (see
https://github.com/swig/swig/pull/3287/changes/296fe5e4325795e8fea933341c20b73566cffc87, 4.4.1 narrowly missed it).

This warning was previously masked by a leaked -Wconversion diagnostic suppression in fmt < 12 (https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt/pull/4588). fmt 12 properly scoped the suppression, exposing this pre-existing SWIG issue.

Add -Wno-conversion to the existing warning suppression list for the python_plugins_loader target, consistent with the existing approach of suppressing warnings in SWIG-generated code that we don't control.

We can revert this change once the downstream packaging picks up the SWIG fix.

changed_files.patch:
@@ -28,9 +28,9 @@ add_library(python_plugins_loader MODULE python_plugins_loader.cpp)
 add_dependencies(python_plugins_loader swigpyrun-header)
 # Include directory with the gereated swigpyrun.h header
 target_include_directories(python_plugins_loader PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
-# This is need because the generated swigpyrun.h contains warnings
+# This is needed because the generated swigpyrun.h contains warnings
 # (which get treated as errors)
-target_compile_options(python_plugins_loader PRIVATE -Wno-sign-conversion -Wno-missing-field-initializers)
+target_compile_options(python_plugins_loader PRIVATE -Wno-sign-conversion -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-conversion)
 
 # disable the 'lib' prefix in order to create python_plugins_loader.so
 set_target_properties(python_plugins_loader PROPERTIES PREFIX "")

commit_summaries.message:
fix(python_plugins_loader): suppress -Wconversion for SWIG-generated code

The SWIG-generated swigpyrun.h contains an implicit size_t to int
narrowing in SWIG_Hash():

  rem -= sizeof(unsigned int);

This triggers -Werror=conversion with GCC 16 (not Clang). The bug is
fixed in SWIG master (https://github.com/swig/swig/pull/3287), but
unfortunately, not in any released SWIG version at the time of writing
(see
https://github.com/swig/swig/pull/3287/changes/296fe5e4325795e8fea933341c20b73566cffc87,
4.4.1 narrowly missed it).

This warning was previously masked by a leaked -Wconversion diagnostic
suppression in fmt < 12 (https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt/pull/4588).
fmt 12 properly scoped the suppression, exposing this pre-existing
SWIG issue.

Add -Wno-conversion to the existing warning suppression list for
the python_plugins_loader target, consistent with the existing
approach of suppressing warnings in SWIG-generated code that we
don't control.

We can revert this change once the downstream packaging picks up the
SWIG fix.

Signed-off-by: Kefu Chai <tchaikov@gmail.com>
